name: Correlate raw facts to DISCOVER the chain (impact not spoon-fed)
context: IAM: access key AKIA-DEPLOY7 authenticates as role 'ci-deployer'.
IAM: role 'ci-deployer' policy allows sts:AssumeRole on role 'prod-backup'.
IAM: role 'prod-backup' policy allows s3:GetObject on arn:aws:s3:::acme-cust-exports/*.
Data: bucket acme-cust-exports is tagged data-classification=customer-pii.
IAM: role 'ci-deployer' has NO other sensitive permissions.
Network: host i-web01 security group allows 22/tcp only from the corporate CIDR 10.8.0.0/16.
Data: bucket acme-public-assets is tagged data-classification=public.

findings.title: Access key AKIA-DEPLOY7 committed in ci/deploy.sh
findings.detail: a long-lived AWS access key is hardcoded in the CI deploy script

findings.title: Critical RCE on the sandbox runner
findings.detail: ephemeral throwaway sandbox, no credentials, no prod network, recycled per job
